# Sandeep Singh — Full-Stack Developer

> Sandeep Singh is a full-stack developer based in Hyderabad, India, building web
> products and AI-powered tools with React, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js, and the
> AI SDK. This site is his portfolio: selected projects and engineering writing.

## About

- Name: Sandeep Singh
- Role: Full-Stack Developer
- Location: Hyderabad, India
- Core stack: React, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js, Hono, PostgreSQL, AI SDK, Tailwind CSS
- Site: https://sandeepnayal.com

## Writing

- [Rendering Strategies](https://sandeepnayal.com/blogs/rendering-strategies): A practical, hands-on tour of SSG, ISR, SSR, CSR and PPR — what each one does, when to use it, and how to see it working in Next.js.
- [Server Components, Client Components and Hydration](https://sandeepnayal.com/blogs/server-and-client-component): What `"use client"` actually does, why some components can touch your database and others can't, and how hydration turns static HTML into a live app.

## Projects

- [Sqliqs — Query your database in plain English](https://sandeepnayal.com/projects/Sqliqs-query-your-database-in-plain-English): A local-first AI agent that queries your database in plain English, then generates reports and visualizations. React, TypeScript, Next.js, AI SDK, PostgreSQL.
- [EventBid — Let venues bid for your event](https://sandeepnayal.com/projects/EventBid-let-venues-bid-for-your-event): A platform that connects event hosts with venues so they receive competitive bids for hosting their events. React, Hono, TanStack Start, AI SDK, PostgreSQL, BullMQ, Redis.
- [DropForm — AI-powered form builder](https://sandeepnayal.com/projects/drop-form-AI-form-builder): Describe a form in plain English and ship a styled, validated, published form in minutes. Next.js, TypeScript, Better Auth, AI SDK, PostgreSQL.
- [DevWork — Freelance Marketplace](https://sandeepnayal.com/projects/devwork-freelance-marketplace): A mobile-first marketplace connecting freelancers with clients looking for skilled developers. Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, AI SDK, Auth.js.
- [Forma — SVG-based design tool](https://sandeepnayal.com/projects/Forma-svg-based-design-tool): A browser-based design tool where the document is just SVG — what you draw is exactly what you export and inspect. React, Tailwind CSS.
- [Fundly — Personal Finance Management App](https://sandeepnayal.com/projects/Fundly-a-personal-finance-management-app): A personal finance app that answers one question well — where did the money actually go this month? Node.js, Express, MongoDB, React.
